rulings.Case Title: ZORIALL, LLC VS. DALE RICHARD DUNCAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Mandatory Relief From Order Granting Defts' Special Motion To Strike Complaint And For Statutory Attorney'S Fees [Ccp473(B), 425.16]
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday November 12, 2015, line 9. PLAINTIFF ZORIALL, LLC's Motion For Mandatory Relief From Order Granting Defendnat's Special Motion To Strike Complaint And For Statutory Attorney'S Fees [CCP73(B), 425.16] GRANTED. The hearing on Defendant's Special Motion to Strike is set for November 30, 2015. Plaintiff's CCP and CRC complaint opposition must be filed and personally served no later than November 13, 2015; Defendant's reply must be filed and served no later than November 19, 2015. defendant shall re-submit courtesy copies of the moving papers. Pursuant to CCP 473(c) Plaintiff's counsel of record shall pay no later than November 30, 2015 (1) $6,212.50 to Defendant's counsel; and (2) $1,000 to the State Bar Client Security Fund. The order shall be served on the California State Bar. = (501/REQ)
